evidence.dark_launch: Live search services do not reference semantic_inventory_projection; Phase 03 exposes only dark helpers and tests.
evidence.version_isolation: Candidate reads filter by selected embedding_version and publish_status='PUBLISHED'.
evidence.publish_flow: Phase 03-enabled filter projection keeps inventory_search_projection visible while listing_inventories waits in PENDING_EMBEDDING until semantic projection publish succeeds.
evidence.tombstone: Semantic rows are removed for active and shadow versions when Phase 03 projection writes are enabled.

deferred: Optional broad Jest run remains deferred because the previous broad run exhausted Node heap in unrelated UI/component suites.
Live search route cutover to semantic_inventory_projection remains Phase 04 work.
